rulings.Case Title: BERNHARD JOCHUM et al VS. TITLE ACQUISITION COMPANY I, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 2, 2014, Line 7: DEFENDANTS HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: Sustained in part and overruled in part. General demurrer per CCP 430.10(d) is overruled. Successive owner is not a necessary party to the action for breach of contract/tort arising during prior ownership. Special Demurer is sustained with leave to amend to comply with CRC 2.112 and to address the ambiguity in paragraph 10. Moving party and its counsel is ordered again (See CGC-13-529041 June 21, 2013 minute order; CGC-12-523629 July 21, 2013 minute order; CGC-12-527295 May 21, 2014 minute order) to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Any future failure to comply with SFLR 2.6B or C will result in the matter being taken off calendar. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TURK STREET APARTMENT GROUP, LLC VS. MARIA DEL SOCORRO PACHECO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 2, 2014, Line 8: DEFENDANT MARIA DEL SOCORRO PACHECO's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED, in part. Demurrer is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege compliance with SFRO 37.9(a)(2), i.e. service of a written notice regarding violation described in the "THREE DAY NOTICE TO QUIT" prior to or together with the "THREE DAY NOTICE TO QUIT." Demurer is overruled on all other grounds. = (501/REQ)
